content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — Privacy policy states "We do not collect, process, or store your location data," but RunSessionManager.swift:1-15 uses CoreLocation with startUpdatingLocation() and the description.txt claims GPS mapping of every run.
Pierre: Apple requires the privacy policy to accurately reflect actual data practices, and a direct contradiction like this is a common rejection trigger under 5.1.1(i). The app clearly collects GPS location to build run routes (`route.append` from `didUpdateLocations`), yet the policy explicitly denies collecting location data. Update the policy to disclose location collection (and how routes are stored/used), and confirm PrivacyInfo declares the location data type.
